titleStmt.title: SII 30.4: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 4. (A.R. No. 4 of 1915.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. Sundarēśvara temple-on the east wall of the third gōpura Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 13, day 306: 13-14th c A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the beginning. It records a royal order, granting land as maḍappuṟa iṟaiyili and tirunandavaṉa-iṟaiyili for the maintenance of a flower garden and also for feeding two devotees (Māhēśvarās) and two śaiva mendicants (Vairāgyās) daily in the Nāgaśūriyaṉ maṭha by Mayilērumperumāḷ of Kāttāvūr in Śevvirukkai-nāḍu and Tatpurusha Śiva alias Paḻi Añjum so ••• •••• The boundaries of the land are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
na ccakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ taṟpuruṣiśivaṉRead- taṟpuruṣaśivaṉpaḻi Añcum co
nāyaṉārkkuc cevvirukkai nāṭṭuk kāttāvūr mayileṟum perumāḷāṉa
yaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku tirunantavaṉam ceyyum per Eḻum kūṟu per Oṉṟum Ākap�
ceyvikkira nākacūriyaṉ tirumaṭattu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uṇṇum māheśvara pe
per Iraṇṭukkum Ivarkaḷukku velaippoka niṟkum payirākikaḷRead- vayirākikaḷper Iraṇṭukkum tamakku
veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Uṭalākap pākaṉūr kūṟṟattu nam Uḻavāṉa muṉaiyataraiyan
taṉacciyap paṟṟukkum maṉai Elkaik kallukkum vaṭakkum mātalaikkuṭi Ellaikkum Akappa
kum ciṟumalai melil pañcavaṉ pāṟaikku teṟkum Āka Innāṉ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉce
kuḷamum kuḷaparappum Āṟuṅ kālum turavum maramum Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samasta prāpti
ṟ tavirttu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu taimmāta mutal Aṭaṅka maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākavum tirunaṉta
nilattāl varum kaṭamai Antarāyam kaṟpūravilai
yokam vācalpeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappāṭṭam E
kai kāttikai paccai Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ muta
yaṉākkut tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākavum Im maṭattil Uṇṇum māheśva
ntom Ippaṭikku Ivolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu cantrādityavat celvatā
koṇṭu Ivvūr nāṉkellaikaḷilum tiruccūlastāpaṉamum paṇṇik koṇ
koṇṭu tāmum tammuṭaiya vaṟkattiluḷḷāṟkum Aṉupavittup potu
ṇṭu 10 3 vatu nāḷ 3 100 6 Ivai pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu 2 tulyam
Digital edition of SII 30.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
